descricao: Allows for significantly higher physical timewarp speeds (up to 1000x), enabling long-duration engine burns and orbital maneuvers to be completed much faster while maintaining active physics. Mobile: Incompatible; requires deep injection into the PC version's physics engine to override the standard timewarp limits. Warnings: Using extreme physical warp speeds (like 1000x) can cause rockets to wobble, explode, or pass through solid planets due to physics calculation gaps.
